description_long: This is a medium-sized, black and white domestic cat with a sleek, short-haired coat. Its body is predominantly black, with a white chest, underbelly, and white markings on its face, paws, and the tip of its tail. The cat has bright green eyes, a small pink nose, and pointed ears with a hint of pink inside. Its posture is alert and standing, with its tail held high and slightly curled at the tip. The overall build is slender yet muscular, typical of an agile street or neighborhood cat. The surface appears soft and matte, resembling natural fur.
description: A black and white cat with green eyes, white paws, and a white chest, standing alert with its tail raised. The fur is short and sleek, and the cat has a slender, agile build.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the cat's black body, white chest, and white front and back paws, with the tail curled upward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cat's green eyes, white chest, white paws, and symmetrical facial markings.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the same black and white fur pattern, with the tail arched and the cat's profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the head, body, and the tail's base, with the black fur dominating and only the tips of the white paws visible.
attribute_fur_pattern: bicolor, black with white chest, paws, and facial markings
